jobs.title: Event Photographer
jobs.description: Join our creative team for exciting photo shoots at events and celebrations. Experience with event photography preferred. Must have own equipment and be available for weekend events.

jobs.title: Videographer
jobs.description: Capture amazing moments at events and celebrations. Experience with video editing and post-production a plus. Looking for someone with strong storytelling skills and technical expertise.

jobs.title: Photo Editor
jobs.description: Edit and retouch photos for our clients. Proficiency in Lightroom and Photoshop required. Must have strong attention to detail and ability to work under deadlines.
